description: CompositionGreen kurti with intricate fish print, made of 100% cotton, has cap sleeves, and a round neck with a green lining extending to the buttoned chest placketFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this green printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh in this fish print, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
